current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker channels (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Jared Alderman) lean heavily into solver-based GTO theory, but Poker Detox — run by Ryan Laplante — puts unusually serious weight on the mental game, tilt control, and decision-making under pressure as first-class strategic concerns rather than afterthoughts, which directly bridges your poker and mental-strength interests. The content is solver-literate but consistently asks how human psychology interacts with GTO concepts in live and online play, a gap your current lineup doesn't really fill. Format is mostly solo coaching-style breakdowns and occasional interviews, at a depth that assumes you already understand the fundamentals.
